goal: preserves_add[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn) = forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(x0 + x1) = complex_conj_fn(x0) + complex_conj_fn(x1) }
proof: function[T0: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) } = preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) }[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn)
let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k0: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(w0 + k0) != complex_conj_fn(w0) + complex_conj_fn(k0) } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { complex_conj_fn(w0) + complex_conj_fn(w1) != complex_conj_fn(w0 + w1) }
let w2: Complex satisfy { complex_conj_fn(w0) + complex_conj_fn(w2) != complex_conj_fn(w0 + w2) }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(x0) + complex_conj_fn(x1) = complex_conj_fn(x0 + x1) }(w0, w2)

goal: preserves_smul[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn) = forall(x0: Real, x1: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(complex_real_module.smul(x0, x1)) = complex_real_module.smul(x0, complex_conj_fn(x1)) }
proof: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: lib(module).Module[T0, T1], x2: lib(module).Module[T0, T2]) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T1) { x0(x1.smul(x3, x4)) = x2.smul(x3, x0(x4)) } = preserves_smul[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x0) }[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn, complex_real_module, complex_real_module)
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(complex_real_module.smul(w0, k0)) != complex_real_module.smul(w0, complex_conj_fn(k0)) } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { complex_real_module.smul(w0, complex_conj_fn(w1)) != complex_conj_fn(complex_real_module.smul(w0, w1)) }
let w2: Complex satisfy { complex_real_module.smul(w0, complex_conj_fn(w2)) != complex_conj_fn(complex_real_module.smul(w0, w2)) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Complex) { complex_real_module.smul(x0, complex_conj_fn(x1)) = complex_conj_fn(complex_real_module.smul(x0, x1)) }(w0, w2)

function[T0: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T3: lib(ring).Ring](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: lib(module).Module[T3, T0], x2: lib(module).Module[T3, T1]) { (preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) and preserves_smul[T3, T0, T1](x1, x2, x0)) = is_linear_map[T3, T0, T1](x1, x2, x0) }[Complex, Complex, Real](complex_conj_fn, complex_real_module, complex_real_module)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: lib(module).Module[T0, T1], x1: lib(module).Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2) { ModuleHom.constraint[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = is_linear_map[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: lib(module).Module[T0, T1], x1: lib(module).Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2) { not ModuleHom.constraint[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) or exists(k0: ModuleHom[T0, T1, T2]) { Option.some[ModuleHom[T0, T1, T2]](k0) = ModuleHom.new[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) } }[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn)

goal: exists(k0: ModuleHom[Real, Complex, Complex]) { ModuleHom.new[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn) = Option.some(k0) }
ModuleHom.new[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn) = Option.some(complex_conj_module_hom)

proof: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: ModuleHom[T0, T1, T2], x1: lib(module).Module[T0, T1], x2: lib(module).Module[T0, T2], x3: T1 -> T2) { Option.some[ModuleHom[T0, T1, T2]](x0) != ModuleHom.new[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x3) or x0.src = x1 }[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_module_hom, complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn)

goal: ModuleHom.new[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn) = Option.some(complex_conj_module_hom)

proof: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: ModuleHom[T0, T1, T2], x1: lib(module).Module[T0, T1], x2: lib(module).Module[T0, T2], x3: T1 -> T2) { Option.some[ModuleHom[T0, T1, T2]](x0) != ModuleHom.new[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x3) or x0.dst = x2 }[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_module_hom, complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn)

goal: is_left_inverse_fn[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn) = forall(x0: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(complex_conj_fn(x0)) = x0 }
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } = is_left_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn)

goal: is_right_inverse_fn[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn) = forall(x0: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(complex_conj_fn(x0)) = x0 }
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } = is_right_inverse_fn[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn)
let w0: Complex satisfy { complex_conj_fn(complex_conj_fn(w0)) != w0 }
function(x0: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(complex_conj_fn(x0)) = x0 }(w0)

function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { (is_left_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) and is_right_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = is_two_sided_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: lib(module).Module[T0, T1], x1: lib(module).Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2) { (is_linear_map[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) and is_bijection_fn[T1, T2](x2)) = is_linear_equiv[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn)

goal: is_linear_equiv_pair[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn) = is_linear_equiv[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn) and is_two_sided_inverse_fn[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn)
proof: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: lib(module).Module[T0, T1], x1: lib(module).Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2) { (is_linear_map[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) and is_bijection_fn[T1, T2](x2)) = is_linear_equiv[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: lib(module).Module[T0, T1], x1: lib(module).Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T2 -> T1) { (is_linear_equiv[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) and is_two_sided_inverse_fn[T1, T2](x2, x3)) = is_linear_equiv_pair[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn)
not is_linear_equiv_pair[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: lib(module).Module[T0, T1], x1: lib(module).Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2) { (is_linear_map[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) and is_bijection_fn[T1, T2](x2)) = is_linear_equiv[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: lib(module).Module[T0, T1], x1: lib(module).Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T2 -> T1) { (is_linear_equiv[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) and is_two_sided_inverse_fn[T1, T2](x2, x3)) = is_linear_equiv_pair[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn)
not is_linear_equiv_pair[Real, Complex, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_module, complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn)
